case_title: HAN LEE VS. GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $30) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2021 - JUDGMENT.PLAINTIFF HAN LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS. LLC AND NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE CO, REPRESENTED BY ANGELA JOHNSON, REGIONAL MANAGER ARE PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LLC THE NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
